title: Contact360 campaign and sequence and template and builder system

sections.title: Campaign entity schema (name, type, status, schedule, channels)
Campaign lifecycle states (draft, scheduled, running, paused, completed, archived)
Audience selection (saved lists, dynamic segments, filters)
Dynamic audience (real-time audience building, inclusion rules)
Recurring send (daily, weekly, monthly, custom intervals)
Optimal send time (AI-powered, per-recipient send time)
Email builder UI (drag-drop, template preview, mobile preview)
Rich text editor (formatting, links, images, HTML)
Block library (text, image, button, divider, spacer, code)
Conditional blocks (show/hide based on contact data)
AI-powered personalization (subject lines, body copy, recommendations)
Preview & test send (send to self, test contacts)
Spam score checker (Outlook, Gmail inbox detection)
A/B testing (subject line, content, send time)
GDPR compliance (consent, data deletion, legitimate interest)
Email best practices (subject lines, sender name, frequency)
SMS editor (character count, preview, link shortening)
SMS A/B testing (message variants, engagement tracking)
Push notification editor (title, body, action, image)
Mobile app integration (iOS, Android, web push)
Deep link handling (navigate to specific app screen)
Custom template creation (save as template from campaign)
Template inheritance (base template, child template override)
Batch delivery (chunk size, parallelism, rate limiting)
Delivery status states (queued, sent, failed, bounced, complained)
Real-time delivery updates (webhook processing, status sync)
Delivery retry logic (exponential backoff, max retries, DLQ)
Sequence builder UI (visual flow, drag-drop, conditions)
Sequence step types (email, SMS, delay, condition, decision)
Trigger types (manual, contact event, time-based, behavioral)
Decision trees (branch based on conditions, A/B paths)
Sequence execution state (pending, in-progress, completed, failed)
Adaptive sequences (AI adjusts based on engagement)
Sequence branching (split paths based on behavior)
Email metrics (sent, delivered, open, click, bounce, complaint)
Email engagement metrics (open rate, click rate, CTR)
Campaign summary dashboard (KPIs, trending, quick insights)
Detailed performance dashboard (by segment, by step)
Comparative analytics (campaign vs campaign, A/B results)
Scheduled reports (daily, weekly, monthly via email)
Data export (CSV, PDF, charts, raw data)
A/B test types (subject line, content, send time, sender)
Test variant creation (control vs test version)
Split definition (50/50, custom split, hold group)
Test hypothesis & success metrics (define before test)
Test result analysis (winner determination, winner deployment)
Winning variant rollout (send to remaining contacts)
Workflow step types (campaign, sequence, condition, wait)
Campaign handoff (from one campaign to next)
Frequency capping (limit contact touches, no more than N/week)
Dynamic content blocks (show/hide based on attributes)
Subject line generation (AI recommends subject lines)
Content recommendations (suggest relevant content per contact)
Send time optimization (predict best send time per contact)
Approval workflows (review, legal approval before send)
Audit logging (who did what, when, campaign history)
DND list compliance (India TRAI, respect DND)
Campaign creation from CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot campaigns)
Contact sync (campaign recipients stay synced with CRM)
Activity logging (campaign sends logged in CRM)
AI campaign creation (agent creates campaigns from natural language)
AI content generation (AI writes copy, subject lines)
Regional compliance (GDPR vs CASL vs others)
Campaign validation (check all recipients, content, links)
Link validation (check all links work, no redirects)
Preview testing (email clients: Outlook, Gmail, Apple Mail)
Failure scenario testing (provider down, rate limits)
Data consistency testing (no double sends, all recipients got)
Campaign progress dashboard (live send counter, metrics)
Delivery monitoring (track delivery status in real-time)
Engagement monitoring (track opens, clicks as they happen)
Alert conditions (bounce rate spike, low open rate)
KPI dashboards (key metrics per campaign type)
Trend analysis (compare to historical, spot trends)
Smart routing (send via best channel based on engagement)
Audience intelligence (skip unengaged, focus on hot leads)
Adaptive sending (real-time optimization based on engagement)
Adaptive content (change content based on real-time engagement)
Predictive campaigns (predict next action, send proactively)
Campaign template types (welcome, onboarding, nurture, winback)
Campaign variants (create similar campaigns for A/B testing)
Campaign sequencing (create campaign series from template)
Best practice guides (how to run campaigns by type)
Campaign versioning (track all changes, restore old versions)
Version comparison (diff old vs new version)
Campaign edit history (who changed what, when)
Campaign send history (all sends, results, metrics)
Performance analysis (why this campaign performed this way)
Content recommendations (suggest better subject lines, copy)
Competitor campaign tracking (see what competitors send)
Best practice alerts (alert when campaign doesn't follow best practices)
